backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining case management data types (Case, Activity, Document) and public functions for CRUD operations on cases, activities, and documents with authorization checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features: displaying ActivityTimeline with specific visual design on history icon click, and updating dummy comments to short single-sentence format.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, pages, hooks, and configuration for the Kollect Lite debt collection application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining OKLCH color system for light and dark themes including primary, secondary, accent, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kollect Lite React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing routing with TanStack Router, authentication state with Internet Identity, and conditional rendering of login prompt or main application.
Activity form component with action/outcome dropdowns, comments textarea, history toggle button, and add comment functionality that submits activities to backend and shows ActivityTimeline.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Vertical timeline component displaying activities with timestamps on left, dark blue circular markers connected by lines, and comments in alternating colored boxes (light blue, purple, green).
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Displays a clickable card for a debt collection case with debtor name, customer ID, phone number, DPD badge (color-coded by severity), and status badge. Navigates to case detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/CommentHistorySe: Renders a timeline of comments for a case with color-coded backgrounds, timestamps, and a vertical connector line. Shows a scrollable list with a maximum height for 3 comments.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A small button component that copies text to clipboard and shows a checkmark icon for 2 seconds after successful copy.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Displays a list of documents with file type icons and preview buttons, plus Upload and Scan action buttons. Shows dummy PDF documents with upload dates.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with Kollect Lite branding, logo, and logout button that clears Internet Identity and query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with header, content outlet, and footer containing copyright and caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Full-screen login page with Kollect Lite branding and Internet Identity login button for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: iPhone frame mockup component (375x812px) with notch, status bar, and scrollable content area for mobile UI preview.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a colored badge for case status (ESCALATED, ACTIVE, PTP) with appropriate styling for each status type.
frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts: Defines Comment interface and exports dummy comment data for multiple cases with timestamps, agent names, and comment text.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating case data, activities, and documents from the backend actor with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including Kollect Lite brand colors (teal-dark, gray-bg) and design tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page component displaying debtor information, status, contact actions, and sections for activities and documents with dummy data lookup.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Task queue page displaying a searchable list of 20 dummy collection cases with filtering and a phone mockup sidebar.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting two existing features related to displaying an ActivityTimeline component with vertical timeline design and short dummy comments when the history icon is clicked in ActivitySection.
